params.name: labelSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels. Defaults to everything.

params.name: fieldSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their fields.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single response. The server may return fewer items than requested. Use the continue token for pagination.

params.name: continue
params.description: Token returned by a previous list call to retrieve the next page of results. This token encodes list position and expiration time.

items.docs: Returns a list of all Composition resources across the cluster. Compositions define how composite resources are translated into sets of managed resources or Composition Function pipelines.

Creates a new Composition resource. The Composition spec must reference a valid CompositeResourceDefinition via compositeTypeRef and define either a resources array (for Resources mode) or a pipeline array (for Pipeline mode).

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific Composition resource, including its spec defining composed resource templates and patches, and its status reflecting active revision information.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Replaces the entire Composition resource with the provided body. This operation triggers a new CompositionRevision to be created, allowing rollback if needed.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Deletes the specified Composition resource. Existing composite resources that reference this Composition will not be deleted but will cease to reconcile until a new Composition is available.

params.name: labelSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels. Defaults to everything.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single response. The server may return fewer items than requested. Use the continue token for pagination.

params.name: continue
params.description: Token returned by a previous list call to retrieve the next page of results. This token encodes list position and expiration time.

items.docs: Returns a list of all CompositeResourceDefinition (XRD) resources. Each XRD defines the schema for a new composite resource type and optionally a claim type that will be installed as Kubernetes CRDs.

Creates a new CompositeResourceDefinition. Upon creation, Crossplane installs corresponding CRDs and begins serving the new composite resource API. If claimNames are specified, a namespaced claim CRD is also installed.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Returns details of a specific CompositeResourceDefinition, including its version schemas, claim configuration, and status conditions reflecting whether the CRDs are established.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Replaces a CompositeResourceDefinition. Crossplane will reconcile the new schema, updating existing CRDs and triggering re-composition of existing composite resources as needed.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Deletes a CompositeResourceDefinition. Crossplane will remove the associated CRDs and all existing composite resources of that type if no finalizers prevent deletion.

params.name: labelSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels. Defaults to everything.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single response. The server may return fewer items than requested. Use the continue token for pagination.

params.name: continue
params.description: Token returned by a previous list call to retrieve the next page of results. This token encodes list position and expiration time.

items.docs: Returns a list of all EnvironmentConfig resources. EnvironmentConfigs hold shared configuration data that can be patched into Compositions via environment patch types, enabling cluster-wide shared values.
Creates a new EnvironmentConfig resource containing arbitrary key-value configuration data. Compositions can select and merge EnvironmentConfigs using label selectors.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Returns a specific EnvironmentConfig resource by name, including its data map of arbitrary configuration key-value pairs.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Deletes a specific EnvironmentConfig. Compositions referencing this config will fail to reconcile until the reference is removed or the config is recreated.

params.name: labelSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels. Defaults to everything.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single response. The server may return fewer items than requested. Use the continue token for pagination.

params.name: continue
params.description: Token returned by a previous list call to retrieve the next page of results. This token encodes list position and expiration time.

items.docs: Returns a list of all Provider package installations. Each Provider installs a set of managed resource CRDs and a controller that reconciles those resources against a specific infrastructure platform.
Installs a new Provider by referencing an OCI image containing the provider package. Crossplane fetches the package, installs its CRDs, and starts the provider controller deployment.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Returns details of a specific Provider, including its package reference, revision activation policy, and status conditions reflecting whether the provider is healthy and all CRDs are installed.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Replaces a Provider resource, typically to update the package image reference to a new version. Crossplane creates a new ProviderRevision and activates it according to the revisionActivationPolicy.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Removes a Provider installation. Crossplane will delete the provider controller and CRDs. Existing managed resources will be orphaned unless deleted first.

params.name: labelSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels. Defaults to everything.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single response. The server may return fewer items than requested. Use the continue token for pagination.

params.name: continue
params.description: Token returned by a previous list call to retrieve the next page of results. This token encodes list position and expiration time.

items.docs: Returns a list of all Composition Function package installations. Functions are OCI images that implement the Composition Function gRPC protocol and are invoked as pipeline steps during composition.
Installs a new Composition Function by referencing its OCI package image. Once installed, the Function can be referenced in Composition pipeline steps by name.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Returns details of a specific Composition Function installation, including its package image reference and status conditions reflecting whether the function is healthy and ready to serve composition requests.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Removes a Composition Function installation. Compositions that reference this Function in their pipeline will fail to reconcile until the Function reference is removed or the Function is reinstalled.

params.name: labelSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels. Defaults to everything.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single response. The server may return fewer items than requested. Use the continue token for pagination.

params.name: continue
params.description: Token returned by a previous list call to retrieve the next page of results. This token encodes list position and expiration time.

items.docs: Returns a list of all Configuration package installations. Configurations bundle Compositions and XRDs together, enabling platform teams to distribute reusable platform APIs as versioned OCI packages.
Installs a new Configuration package. Crossplane fetches the OCI image, installs the bundled Compositions and XRDs, and tracks revisions for upgrade management.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Returns details of a specific Configuration installation, including its package image reference, revision history, and status conditions.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Removes a Configuration installation. Crossplane will remove the bundled Compositions and XRDs if no other resources depend on them.

params.name: labelSelector
params.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels. Defaults to everything.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single response. The server may return fewer items than requested. Use the continue token for pagination.

params.name: continue
params.description: Token returned by a previous list call to retrieve the next page of results. This token encodes list position and expiration time.

items.docs: Returns a list of all DeploymentRuntimeConfig resources. These resources customize the Kubernetes Deployment and ServiceAccount used to run Provider and Function controller pods.
Creates a DeploymentRuntimeConfig to customize how Crossplane deploys Provider or Function pods. Providers and Functions reference this resource via runtimeConfigRef in their spec.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Returns a specific DeploymentRuntimeConfig, including its deployment template and service account template overrides.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the Crossplane resource.

items.docs: Deletes a DeploymentRuntimeConfig. Providers or Functions referencing this config via runtimeConfigRef will continue using the last applied configuration until they are updated.
